intro: The Dracaena parva, also known as the Dragon Tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its small, shrub-like appearance and glossy green leaves. The health benefits of Dracaena parva include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues.
